name: Iso11783OPChangeActiveMask
title: Iso11783OPChangeActiveMask
syntax: long Iso11783OPChangeActiveMask( dword ecuHandle, dword maskID );
description: This function changes the active data mask. The Change Active Mask command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
